fomod.Name: Build a Follower
fomod.Author: karlo (rework of Lazy Followers by LazyGirl)
fomod.Description: Create-your-own companions: stamp RaceMenu presets onto permanent template actors, manage them from an MCM, save/load with JContainers. Choose 80F+80M, 160 female-only, or 160 male-only template slots. Requires SKSE64, SkyUI, RaceMenu, JContainers, PapyrusUtil.
